❦ Impel Down ❦

Rpg Scenario style Bot

❦ Lock up Week - Impel Down Series ❦

[1/5]

Characters included:

Buggy the clown | Galdino, Mr. 3 | Bon clay | Shiryu | Sir Crocodile | Donquixote Doflamingo

NOTES PLEASE READ:

Please keep in mind that due to the "prison for criminals" scenario, this bot might contain sensitive, harsh and heavy topics maybe into the dead dove territory depending on the LLM and user's bot usage. Your mental health is always a priority so only consume this content with this in mind💛

This is an experimental bot I made to learn and push the llm to see how many characters/locations I could put into one bot as someone requested me a mirror world bot I'm working on. However, due to this being experimental and being my first on this style, know that there might be some inconsistencies and inaccuracy regarding world and character lore due token limitations . You might have to hold he LLM's hand regarding that.

Creators's corner notes

Lastly, as this contains multiple people/locations, I cannot test all possibilities by myself, if you find something that is extremely off lore/character and is not llm related feel free to give feed back on this form and I'll see if I'm able to fix it. It's totally not required, but it will help me make the bot better💛

Not sure if I'm ever gonna make other cities/locations bots
